metadata.description: Azure AI Services / Foundry account name that hosts the target project.
Azure AI Foundry project name inside the AI Services account.
Project connection name to create or update.
Azure AI Search endpoint, for example https://mysearch.search.windows.net
Knowledge base name exposed through the Search MCP endpoint.
Query key or other KB-compatible API key used by the Foundry MCP connection.

resources.name: [format('{0}/{1}/{2}', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('aiServicesAccountName'), parameters('projectName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('aiServicesAccountName'), parameters('projectName')), '/')[1], parameters('connectionName'))]

connectionId.value: [resourceId('Microsoft.CognitiveServices/accounts/projects/connections', split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('aiServicesAccountName'), parameters('projectName')), '/')[0], split(format('{0}/{1}', parameters('aiServicesAccountName'), parameters('projectName')), '/')[1], parameters('connectionName'))]
